privileged_info_summary: The task specifies a synthetic double-stage scissor lift with arm length 3000mm, deployment angle 35°, and pin diameter 40mm. The expected platform height is calculated as 2 × 3000 × sin(35°) = 3441.46mm. All specifications are internally consistent: the setup script creates these exact values, the verifier uses them correctly, and the task description matches. The data is fully synthetic (not from external sources), with specifications embedded in task.json and created at runtime by setup_task.sh. A tight tolerance of 10mm (0.29% of height) is specified for verification. All four required CAD layers (STRUCTURE, PINS, PLATFORM, DIMENSIONS) are clearly defined.
